reviews.review_description: You give smol thing cookie it give money when put in basket
I love this game so much, and I will definitely be getting the full version! So much is also included in the demo, kudos to the dev/s for being so nice lol. Great game!

I think this game is adorable and easy. My only issue is the glitches. It wants you to put 50 carrots in a basket for the office level. The issue is that you have to travel away from the office to regenerate each carrot. I expected the veggies to run around like they do in the garden. It will be extremely tedious to repeat the office intro 50 times. The terrarium seemed to be malfunctioning as well. You can not lure the carrot with a cookie. I placed two in there but returned to one. I think a zen garden, hide and seek, defend the veggies, and I Spy feature would be a good update options. I'm looking forward to the paid version that fixes the glitches.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you so much for your kind review and detailed feedback! I'm so sorry you experienced glitches. The full paid version of the game is already available here: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/experiences/cookie-gardening/5368758349867888
(Both the demo and the full version are still in early access and will continue to receive further development and fixes over time.)

reviews.review_description: Amazing but please make it so that tomatoes can’t eat other veggies in the terrarium

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! I like that idea, and I'll keep it in mind for the next time I do an update.

reviews.review_title: Lure & Sell Living Veges With Cookies?!
reviews.review_description: It is just like what the title says. All kinds of cute vegetables running around you as if they were mice while you bait them with chocolate chip cookies so that they'll come closer and you can grab them and then put them in a basket to sell them. Rinse and repeat. The demo limits you to only the first upgrade which is the office. Edit: From the gameplay videos I saw, you can also keep some of the veges as "pets" as well, but you'll still have to sell most of them to afford the upgrades.
Sorry for dropping the f bomb and the s match but this game is so good and cute and sad and cute and cute and scary and, I LOVE IT
One of the best sandbox games I've played on oculus and the full version isn't even out yet! So excited to see what's next.
I went in, expecting just a boring farming simulator, but I came out very surprised at the game's quality and humor, with this game twisting my expectations into something completely different

Nature has many mysteries. 
Fun experience with a nice, colorful atmosphere and cheery characters. Looking forward to the full version to experience more garden locations.
My family and I really enjoy playing this game! We run out the oculus battery almost every time we play it! It's just a wonderful game. We find more unique and fun surprises every time :D
